basic_details.job_title: ICMR NIHR Project Technical Support-III Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Health Research (ICMR NIHR)
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Health Research (ICMR NIHR) has released the official Project Technical Support-III Notification 2026 on its official website. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced under the ICMR NIHR Project Technical Support-III Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged up to 35 years with a Graduate Degree in Biotechnology/Biochemistry/Microbiology/Biomedical Sciences/Genetics with 3 years post-qualification experience or a Post Graduate Degree in Biotechnology/Biochemistry/Microbiology/Biomedical Sciences/Genetics can attend the walk-in interview scheduled for 08-07-2026. content_sections.heading: ICMR NIHR Project Technical Support-III Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the ICMR NIHR Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download ICMR NIHR Project Technical Support-III Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ICMR NIHR Project Technical Support-III Vacancy Details 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Graduate degree with Biotechnology/Biochemistry/Microbiology / Biomedical Sciences/Genetics with 3 years post-qualification experience OR Post Graduate Degree in Biotechnology/Biochemistry/Microbiology/ Biomedical Sciences/Genetics.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age relaxation admissible for SC/ST/OBC candidates, retrenched Government Employees, Departmental Candidates and Ex-servicemen as per Central Government/DoPT/ICMR instructions.

content_sections.heading: ICMR NIHR Project Technical Support-III Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
Selection Process
content_sections.text: Walk-in Interview / Written Test Written Test (if more than 30 candidates) Interview (top candidates if written test conducted)

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: ICMR NIHR Project Technical Support-III Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for ICMR NIHR Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Project Technical Support-III posts is scheduled for 08 July 2026. Candidates should report to the venue on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies announced by ICMR NIHR?
faq.answer: ICMR NIHR has announced a total of 2 vacancies for the post of Project Technical Support-III through this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Technical Support-III position?
faq.answer: Candidates should possess a Graduate degree in Biotechnology/Biochemistry/Microbiology/Biomedical Sciences/Genetics with 3 years of experience, or a Post Graduate Degree in the same fields.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Project Technical Support-III post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for this post is 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Project Technical Support-III role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 28,000/- per month, plus HRA.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for ICMR NIHR Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly at the specified venue and time.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted in Jodhpur, Rajasthan. The exact venue details will be available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates (if applicable).

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for the Project Technical Support-III posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a Walk-in Interview/Written Test. A written test may be conducted if more than 30 candidates appear, followed by an interview for shortlisted candidates.
